programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: A young Donald Trump builds his business in the '70s and '80s, mentored by ruthless lawyer Roy Cohn. 2024. Canada. Director: Ali Abbasi. Starring: Sebastian Stan, Jeremy Strong.

programme.title: You, The Living
programme.desc: A series of short vignettes depicting the sorrow, joy, love, and longing that is the human experience. 2007. Sweden. Director: Roy Andersson. Starring: Elisabeth Helander, Jorgen Nohall.

programme.title: Lowlifes
programme.desc: A family's vacation takes a wrong turn as they get a weird feeling about their new accomodation. 2024. Canada. Directors: Tesh Guttikonda, Mitch Oliver. Starring: Amanda Fix, Matthew MacCaull.

programme.title: Presence
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, the Paynes settle down in an old house, disturbing an entity that watches their every move. 2024. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Lucy Liu, Chris Sullivan.

programme.title: The End
programme.desc: Years after environmental collapse, a family's idyllic bunker-life crumbles when a stranger arrives. 2024. Germany, Denmark. Director: Joshua Oppenheimer. Starring: Tilda Swinton, George MacKay.

programme.title: Tetsuo: The Bullet Man
programme.desc: After his son's death, Anthony's emotions begin to fester, turning him into something unrecognisable. 2009. Japan. Director: Shinya Tsukamoto. Starring: Eric Bossick, Akiko Monou.

programme.title: Tarrac
programme.desc: After her father suffers a heart attack, a woman finds solace after returning home to Ireland's southwest coast. 2022. Ireland. Director: Declan Recks. Starring: Kelly Gough, Lorcan Cranitch.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: Irish detective Kat returns home to solve a murder, unearthing personal connections that might complicate things. 2025. UK. Director: Tom Sullivan. Starring: Sinead MacInnes, Neil Graham S1 E1.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: Kat can't prove her theory about the tycoon without proof, and his son's alibi isn't as sound as once thought. 2025. UK. Director: Tom Sullivan. Starring: Andrew MacInnes, Elspeth Turner S1 E2.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: Sir Douglas' account of the night is backed by evidence, strengthening Kat's suspicions about the Tycoon. 2025. UK. Director: Tom Sullivan. Starring: Sinead MacInnes, Elspeth Turner S1 E3.

programme.title: The Island
